ext_name.description: The name of the extension displayed in Chrome

ext_description.message: 키보드 단축키를 사용하여 Chrome 페이지 확대/축소를 세밀하게 조절합니다.
ext_description.description: The description of the extension displayed in Chrome Web Store

action_title.description: The tooltip text for the browser action icon

command_zoom_in.description: Description for the zoom in keyboard shortcut command

command_zoom_out.description: Description for the zoom out keyboard shortcut command

popup_title.description: The title displayed in the popup header

popup_current_step.description: Label showing the current zoom step percentage

popup_zoom_step_range.description: Label for the zoom step slider control

popup_shortcuts.description: Label for the keyboard shortcuts section

popup_shortcut_settings_hint.description: Hint text before the settings link

popup_shortcut_settings_link.description: Link text to open the Chrome extension shortcuts settings

popup_shortcut_settings_suffix.description: Suffix text after the settings link (Korean grammar requires this)

popup_shortcut_not_set.description: Displayed when a keyboard shortcut is not configured
